name: Erika Feibig
bio: Erika Feibig is excited to take the microphone after youthful years of acting; a favorite role is Two Rooms (Lanie) at Olympia Little Theatre. As a cellist, she played at ACT/5th Avenue (The Last Five Years), sits principal at Lake Washington Symphony, and is Assistant Principal of Ballard Civic Orchestra. Recently she has performed with the Federal Way and Yakima Symphonies. Pit work includes BPA, Reboot, and Taproot. She coaches Bellevue Youth Symphony and is the Cello Instructor at Edmonds College. She studied at Oberlin College.
